// Schema for stage 4: Rewritten section: Output from rewriting agent that generates final prose sections from extracted QA
title: Stage 4 Rewritten Section Per Topic

topic_id.description: Reference to the topic_id from stage 2a

topic_name.description: Human-readable name of the topic (from stage 2a)

section_text.description: Rewritten prose section for this topic, grounded in QA extracts

source_segment_count.description: Number of source segments (chunks or QA extracts) that contributed to this section

has_unsupported_claims.description: Set to true if QA grounding found claims with no direct source (optional)
